description: SOTA-stack training screen: two control replicas plus six train-observable refinements, then a machine-saturating finalist phase that repartitions all visible GPUs across survivors, plus optional 8xH100 champion confirmation.

slots.name: sota_stack_control_a
slots.validates: The local code path can reproduce the public-style regime.
slots.falsifies: All derivative screens are suspect because the control itself is unstable.
notes: This is the exact control for all six candidates.

slots.name: sota_stack_control_b
slots.why: Noise estimate for the record-like control.
slots.validates: Short-run control variance is small enough for aggressive pruning.
slots.falsifies: The screen horizon is too noisy to interpret small deltas.
notes: Use R0A vs R0B spread to calibrate kill thresholds.

slots.name: smaller_batch_more_steps
slots.why: Tests whether the record-like stack is over-batched and can gain from more optimizer steps.
slots.validates: Better BPB or similar BPB with more steps reached.
slots.falsifies: Extra gradient noise dominates the additional updates.

slots.name: higher_muon_momentum
slots.why: Transfers the higher-momentum trunk win onto the SOTA stack.
slots.validates: Smoother updates improve early and final quality relative to the same control.
slots.falsifies: The record-like stack already has enough implicit smoothing.

slots.name: longer_warmdown
slots.why: Tests whether the int6 stack benefits from a longer convergence tail.
slots.validates: Final BPB or quant gap improves on the same SOTA-style stack.
slots.falsifies: Longer decay just starves the short run of useful learning rate.

slots.name: muon_weight_decay
slots.why: Tests whether Muon WD helps the record-like int6 stack specifically.
slots.validates: Norm control reduces quantization damage without hurting fit too much.

slots.name: muon_backend_steps_7
slots.why: Tests whether slightly more Muon orthogonalization improves per-step quality on the record-like stack.
slots.validates: Quality improves enough to pay for any step-time hit.
slots.falsifies: The extra Muon compute is pure overhead in this regime.
notes: This replaces the eval-only stride test in the first training screen.

slots.name: batch_momentum_warmdown_combo
slots.why: Tests whether the three most grounded train-side ideas stack on the SOTA baseline.
slots.validates: The interaction beats the best single-factor result.
slots.falsifies: The ideas do not compose, or one of them is carrying the whole story.
